channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-698] conf-sanity test_0 single mount setup failed
item.description:
2.1.0_RC2 testing. conf-sanity could not setup the fs for testing. Note that this is ran after racer, but I couldn't find any error after racer

Report: https://maloo.whamcloud.com/test_sets/fe1a5ebe-e43f-11e0-9909-52540025f9af

== conf-sanity test 0: single mount setup == 03:13:19 (1316513599)
start mds service on fat-intel-1vm3
Starting mds: -o user_xattr,acl /dev/lvm/P0 /mnt/mds
fat-intel-1vm3: debug=0x33f0404
fat-intel-1vm3: subsystem_debug=0xffb7e3ff
fat-intel-1vm3: debug_mb=32
Started lustre-MDT0000
start ost1 service on fat-intel-1vm4
Starting ost1: /dev/lvm/P0 /mnt/ost1
fat-intel-1vm4: debug=0x33f0404
fat-intel-1vm4: subsystem_debug=0xffb7e3ff
fat-intel-1vm4: debug_mb=32
Started lustre-OST0000
mount lustre on /mnt/lustre.....
Starting client: fat-intel-1vm1.lab.whamcloud.com: -o user_xattr,acl fat-intel-1vm3@tcp:/lustre /mnt/lustre
mkdir: cannot create directory `/mnt/lustre': File exists
warning: /mnt/lustre: cannot resolve: Operation not supported
conf-sanity test_0: @@@@@@ FAIL: client start failed
Dumping lctl log to /logdir/test_logs/2011-09-19/lustre-mixed-el6-x86_64_283_-7f6a2ad2c9e0/conf-sanity.test_0.*.1316513617.log
df: `/mnt/lustre': Operation not supported
df: no file systems processed
cp: accessing `/mnt/lustre/a': Operation not supported
conf-sanity test_0: @@@@@@ FAIL: test_0 failed with 41
Dumping lctl log to /logdir/test_logs/2011-09-19/lustre-mixed-el6-x86_64_283_-7f6a2ad2c9e0/conf-sanity.test_0.*.1316513622.log
Resetting fail_loc on all nodes...done.
item.environment:
Lustre Clients:
Tag: 1.8.6-wc1
Distro/Arch: RHEL6/x86_64 (kernel version: 2.6.32_131.2.1.el6)
Build: http://newbuild.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-b1_8/100/arch=x86_64,build_type=client,distro=el6,ib_stack=inkernel/
Network: TCP
ENABLE_QUOTA=yes

Lustre Servers:
Tag: v2_1_0_0_RC2
Distro/Arch: RHEL6/x86_64 (kernel version: 2.6.32-131.6.1.el6_lustre.g65156ed.x86_64)
Build: http://newbuild.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-master/228/arch=x86_64,build_type=server,distro=el6,ib_stack=inkernel/
Network: TCP
item.summary: conf-sanity test_0 single mount setup failed

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
